qa_pairs.question: How can users list the Python versions supported by a loaded Gurobi module on the Digital Research Alliance of Canada clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: After loading the desired Gurobi module, users can change to the `$EBROOTGUROBI/lib` directory and run the command `ls -d python*` to list the supported Python versions.

qa_pairs.question: Which specific Python versions are supported by Gurobi 10.0.3 when `StdEnv/2023` is loaded on the Digital Research Alliance of Canada clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: When `StdEnv/2023` and `gurobi/10.0.3` are loaded, the supported Python versions include `python3.10_utf32`, `python3.11_utf32`, `python3.7`, `python3.7_utf32`, `python3.8_utf32`, and `python3.9_utf32`.
